role_summary: the enterprise risk manager designs and imp lements enterprise -wide risk management  frameworks to support organizational objectives.
responsibilities: • develop and maintain erm frameworks   • identify and assess strategic, operational, and financial risks   • monitor risk exposure and mitigation plans   • report risk metrics to senior management and board   • integrate risk management into business strategy   • support regulatory and governance requirements
qualifications: • qualified ca   • strong knowledge of erm frameworks (coso, iso)   • strategic thinking and gov ernance skills
